theme_and_archetype.primary_archetype: Archetype 4: Swiss & High-Contrast (Adapted for Apple-Inspired Minimalism)
theme_and_archetype.reasoning: TruthLens requires an authoritative, objective, and clear interface to build trust in its fake news detection capabilities. Combining Apple's crystal glassmorphism with high-contrast structural typography delivers a premium, highly trustworthy 'Command Center' feel.

rules.gradients: Avoid full-screen gradients. Use soft, ambient radial glows (e.g., `bg-blue-500/5` or `bg-teal-500/5`) behind main layout containers to add depth.
rules.contrast: Text must meet APCA standards. Always use `text-slate-900` in light mode and `text-slate-50` in dark mode for primary readings.
rules.accent_usage: Use the Accent Teal (#14B8A6) sparingly for micro-interactions, circular gauge highlights, and small toggle active states. Primary CTAs should use Primary Blue (#2563EB).

fonts.headings: Outfit, General Sans, or Cabinet Grotesk (Banned: Inter for headings)
fonts.body: SF Pro Display, system-ui, or Inter

glassmorphism.light_classes: bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-2xl backdrop-saturate-150 border border-white/40 shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)]
glassmorphism.dark_classes: bg-slate-900/60 backdrop-blur-2xl backdrop-saturate-150 border border-slate-700/50 shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.2)]
glassmorphism.usage: Use for sticky headers, floating navs, the floating AI assistant, and overlapping modal dialogs.

cards.radii: rounded-3xl for main page sections/bento grids, rounded-xl for inner data widgets
cards.style: Flat with very subtle border `border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-800` and ultra-soft shadow `shadow-sm hover:shadow-md hover:-translate-y-0.5 transition-all duration-300`

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing & High Density Mixed. Use generous padding (p-8, p-12) for outer wrappers and tight gap (gap-4, gap-6) for internal bento grids.
spacing_and_layout.dashboard_grid: Mode B: The 'Control Room' Grid. `grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4` with `gap-6`. Cards must stretch vertically `h-full`.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Left-align text, data labels, and paragraphs. Center-align only major hero text.

components.buttons: Rounded-full `rounded-full` or deeply rounded `rounded-xl` for premium Apple feel. High contrast hover states.
components.charts: Recharts. Use monochromatic blue palettes for generic data, and semantic colors (Success/Danger) for Trust vs. Fake metrics. Remove default chart grid lines or make them extremely faint `stroke-slate-100`.
components.gauge: Animated circular SVG gauge for Credibility Score (0-100). Use Framer Motion to animate from 0 to target score. Color shifts from Danger -> Warning -> Success.
components.xai_heatmap: Display article text with inline `span` highlights. `bg-red-500/20` for clickbait/bias, `bg-yellow-500/20` for emotional language. Include a sidebar/tooltip explaining WHY it was highlighted.
components.upload_dropzone: Large drag-and-drop area. `border-2 border-dashed border-slate-300 dark:border-slate-700 rounded-3xl p-12 flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-slate-500 hover:bg-slate-50 dark:hover:bg-slate-800/50 transition-colors`.

motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Subtle fade and slide up (`initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 10 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} transition={{ duration: 0.4 }}`).
motion_and_interactions.stagger: List items (history table, dashboard widgets) must stagger in.

testing_requirements.data_testid: MANDATORY. Every interactive element (buttons, inputs, tabs, chart wrappers, report buttons) must have a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid="analyze-submit-button"`).

landing_page.hero: Center-aligned. Giant H1 text. Floating glassmorphism UI mockups showing the analysis in action behind the text or next to it.
landing_page.features: Bento-box grid (Mode A 'Tetris'). Asymmetrical layout. High contrast.
landing_page.workflow: Step-by-step horizontal scrolling or vertical connected line timeline.

dashboard.layout: Sidebar navigation (collapsible). Main content area with top sticky header.
dashboard.cards: Stats cards with Recharts sparklines. Pie chart for overall Fake vs Real ratio. Line chart for activity over time.

analyze_page.layout: Split view or focused central column. Input area on left/top, real-time analysis results appearing on right/bottom.
analyze_page.tabs: Text | URL | File Upload. Use Shadcn Tabs, styled as pill-shaped segmented controls.

history_and_trending.table: Clean, borderless rows. Badge indicators for Status. Filter dropdowns.
history_and_trending.word_cloud: Use a responsive D3 or simpler Recharts scatter plot if word cloud is too complex, styled minimally.

hero_backgrounds.description: Abstract blue geometric pattern. Use as a very low-opacity overlay for the landing page hero section.
Abstract 3D digital blocks. Can be used for decorative elements in the tech workflow section.

avatars.description: Journalist / News Reporter avatar for testimonial or user profile.

contextual_images.description: Man reading a newspaper. Use for the 'Why TruthLens?' or Mission section on the landing page.
'Trust No One' book edge. Conceptual image for the 'Source Reliability' feature description.
